statement.informal: `autothrottle_step` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (abs(speed_target) <= V_MAX ∧ abs(speed_meas) <= V_MAX ∧ abs(integral) <= I_LIMIT_MAX ∧ kp >= 0.0 ∧ kp <= KP_MAX ∧ ki >= 0.0 ∧ ki <= KI_MAX), the function's result satisfies (result >= 0.0 ∧ result <= THROTTLE_MAX). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
statement.formal_lean:
-- @verify obligation pulled from autothrottle.eml
-- theorem autothrottle_within_unit_interval : \u2200 args, (abs(speed_target) <= V_MAX ∧ abs(speed_meas) <= V_MAX ∧ abs(integral) <= I_LIMIT_MAX ∧ kp >= 0.0 ∧ kp <= KP_MAX ∧ ki >= 0.0 ∧ ki <= KI_MAX) \u2192 (result >= 0.0 ∧ result <= THROTTLE_MAX) := sorry
